---
title: "Portfolio"
about:
  template: solana
engine: knitr
resume:
  pdf: "Resume_Connor_Hanan.pdf"
---

::: {.portfolio-grid}

::: {.portfolio-card}
## Advent of Code
A collection of annual programming puzzles, solved using a mix of R, Julia, Python, ObservableJS, and more.

[View on GitHub](https://github.com/syrchanan/advent_of_code){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::

::: {.portfolio-card}
## Assorted Projects
A mix of data science and statistical analysis work in R and Python — from broadcast media research to academic projects.

[View on GitHub](https://github.com/syrchanan/portfolio){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::

::: {.portfolio-card}
## `connoR`
A personal R package for TV ratings analysis and other utilities, including pareto implementations and streak counting.

[View on GitHub](https://github.com/syrchanan/connoR){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::

::: {.portfolio-card}
## Civil War Simulator
Python/Typescript monorepo using Lanchester equations to model Civil war battles. Takes into account unit experience, types, dynamic morale, etc.

[View on GitHub](https://github.com/syrchanan/civil_war_sim){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::

::: {.portfolio-card}
## AI Tooling
Personal infrastructure for AI development — custom Docker environments, Claude prompts, skills, and an iterative agent workflow system.

[View on GitHub](https://github.com/syrchanan/ai_tooling){.btn .btn-outline-primary}
:::

:::
